nodes.label: Mem0 (pronounced "mem-zero") is an open-source memory layer for AI agents.

nodes.label: Think of it like a "memory" for your AI coding assistants.
nodes.norm_label: think of it like a "memory" for your ai coding assistants.

nodes.label: - Claude helps you build HomeScreen.kt → session ends
nodes.norm_label: - claude helps you build homescreen.kt → session ends

nodes.label: - New Claude session starts → it remembers NOTHING
nodes.norm_label: - new claude session starts → it remembers nothing

nodes.label: - You have to explain the entire project again from scratch
nodes.norm_label: - you have to explain the entire project again from scratch

nodes.label: - Claude builds HomeScreen.kt → automatically saves key facts to Mem0

nodes.label: HOW AI AGENTS USE THIS FILE:
nodes.norm_label: how ai agents use this file:

nodes.label: 1. Read this file at the START of every session
nodes.norm_label: 1. read this file at the start of every session

nodes.label: 2. Scroll to the BOTTOM — find the latest entry
nodes.norm_label: 2. scroll to the bottom — find the latest entry

nodes.label: 3. Read CURRENT_MICRO_TASK → find that ID in SPRINT_SYSTEM.md
nodes.norm_label: 3. read current_micro_task → find that id in sprint_system.md

nodes.label: 4. Read that micro-task's full instructions in SPRINT_SYSTEM.md
nodes.norm_label: 4. read that micro-task's full instructions in sprint_system.md

nodes.label: 5. Do ONLY that micro-task — nothing more
nodes.norm_label: 5. do only that micro-task — nothing more

nodes.label: 6. At the END of your session, APPEND a new entry using the template below
nodes.norm_label: 6. at the end of your session, append a new entry using the template below

nodes.label: 7. NEVER delete or edit old entries — only append new ones
nodes.norm_label: 7. never delete or edit old entries — only append new ones

nodes.label: RULE: CURRENT_MICRO_TASK in the latest entry is what the next agent starts on.
